feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Data Services
feed.subtitle: SAP Data Services Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: OData expand + CDS/AMDP = bad performance
entry.content:
I have a CDS with multiple associations which uses a table function with AMDP. This is referenced inside an OData service. Everything is pretty basic.

There are some fields that require expanding in order to retrieve the texts. These are simple 0..1 association based only on one field.

Whenever data is retrieved via smart table, the main CDS is queried for each line and each field that is expanded. So, for example, I have 3 fields that require expanding and 8 rows retrieved, that means the main CDS is queried up to 24 + 1 (from the main request) times. As you can imagine, this translates in very poor  performance as the number of rows grow.

The cause is that for each association, the SADL joins it with the main CDS. So if the main CDS looks like this:

 

define new entity ZI_MainCDS
as select from ZI_TableFunction

association [0..1] to I_Plant as _Plant on _Plant = $projection.Plant
{
  key id as Id,
  ...
  @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_Plant'
  plant as Plant,
  _Plant,
  ...
}

 

The SADL first reads from the ZI_MainCDS. Then, it expands for the Plant text and reads from I_Plant but does inner join with ZI_MainCDS as well to ensure the value exists. Unfortunately, this means a second query on ZI_MainCDS that I don't want. This repeats for every association.

Is it possible to prevent joining the main CDS for each association? I know that I could implement GET_EXPANDED_ENTITYSET and do everything manually but that would take a lot of time and really defeats the purpose of using fiori elements.

entry.title: SAP BODS COMP3 fields
entry.content:
Hello,

In our current project we have a requirement to load COMP3 fields using BODS. COMP3 fields are not properly displayed in .txt files. We are trying to use Cobol copy book format to load the data.

We also tried to convert the .txt file to .cpy file. All fields expect COMP3 is getting loaded correctly. Has any one worked on loaded COMP3 fields using SAP BODS. 

What should be the input file format? We are getting the input file from a external agency. What type of file we should ask them to provide us. Any help on how to load COMP3 fields using BODS will be of great help.

Thanks, Anzari

entry.title: Execute and Stop a job using command
entry.content:
Hii,

I'm working on executing jobs from unix using commands , i got two files from the SAP Data Services Management Console when exporting execution command.

I would like to have a guide to how to launch/start the jobs and how to stop/terminate th job when needed automatically .

ASAP Please!!

entry.title: To understand the flow between ControlM (Third party scheduler) scheduling to SAP Data Services
entry.content:
We would like to understand the end-to-end process from Control M scheduling for BODS jobs

entry.title: only SAP DS without SLT ingest S4 HANA Table and CDS view Delta changes to GCP BigQuery?
entry.content: SAP DS formerly known as BODS has Extract, Transform and Load (ELT) capability. It can extract SAP S4 HANA Table and CDS View data including Delta changes. Why we cannot just use SAP DS to extract and load Table data and CDS View data (With Delta changes) to FCP Bigquery (Non SAP Target). We have tested it is working. But nor seeing any document o blogs to support it. There is one GCP document explain how to export SAP S4 HANA to BigQuery using SAP DS only. But not talks about Delta changes. So wondering is it right approach or not? either way what are the pros and cons?

entry.title: Informatica to CI-DS
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We wanted to rebuild the integration present in informatica into  SAP CI-DS. Could you please let me know what are the necessary steps we need to consider for this.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Rohit Mohanto

entry.title: Excel to HANA table
entry.content: Need to schedule an excel extraction from a shared site, I need to load the data to SAP HANA. I have heard words such SDI, Data Services and DODS. Which is the more reliable tool to perform this repeated process.

entry.title: Inplace upgrade to SAP Data Services 4.3
entry.content:
We are planning to upgrade SAP DS, so we need your assistance. 

Environment:
==========                                                 

IPS 4.2 SP09 Patch 600
SAP Data Services 4.2 SP14 PATCH 18
Database Version: Oracle 19c.
Operating system: Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server Release 7.9 (Maipo)
Microsoft SQL Server: DIGITS
IBM DB2: 7.5

  1. Can we go ahead with in-place upgrade Data Services 4.3 SP03 in the current environment? If yes, please suggest your input.
  2. When do we need to upgrade SAP Data Services 4.2 SP14 to Data Services? 4.3 SP03: Do we need to download the entire software or any upgrade patch? 
  3. When we need to upgrade IPS 4.2 SP09 to IPS 4.3 SP04, do we need to download the entire software or any upgrade patches?
  4. If possible, please specify the required software to download for the upgrade from SAP Data Services 4.2 SP14 to Data Services 4.3 SP03. 
  5. If possible, please share the software download direct link for DS 4.3 SP03.
  6. If possible, please share the software download link for IPS 4.2 SP09 and support patch.
  7. Please suggest that the that the below-specified steps are correct for an upgrade in the in-place environment and give some details for the upgrade.
    1. Upgrade IPS from 4.2 SP09 to 4.3 SP04
    2. Upgrade DS from 4.2 SP14 to 4.3 SP03.
    3. Upgrade the repository manager from 4.2 SP14 to 4.3 SP03.
    4. Upgrade local from 4.2 SP14 to 4.3 SP03
    5. Upgrade finished.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to extend the P1 support of SAP Data Services 4.2 SP14 P18
entry.content:
What is Mainstream Support and Priority1 Support  for SAP Data Services?

Since we are reaching end of support for SAP DS 4.2 SP14 PATCH18 by the end of December 2024, can we buy extended Priority 1 support for SAP DS 4.2 SP14 PATCH18? 
or do we need to upgrade to the latest version?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Error typing Vietnamese words in SAP
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

When I type in Vietnamese some complex words like "đại" in data fields, it changes to "d?i" or "vẫn" -> "v?n". Please help!

Regards.

entry.title: BAPI/ FM to load Customer master data with Data services
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Can you please suggest a BAPI/ FM that can be used to create a BP along with customer data like Company code, Address, sales etc..

We checked out RFC_CVI_EI_INBOUND_MAIN, but this is consuming the number range even when we are not committing the changes (i.e. IV_DOCOMMIT = " ").

Thank you so much for your help in advance!

Best Regards,
Het Patel

entry.title: BODS Designer 4.3 crashes when loading the central repository.
entry.content:
Hello,
we have installed BODS Designer 4.3 for our developers on a terminal server. since 17.07.2024 we have the following problem.
BODS Designer 4.3 always crashes when we want to load job data from the central repository.
the tracing in the DSUserConfig.txt is set, but does not show any information in the DesignerTrace.csv that could cause the crash.
Only the following error message is available in the event viewer.
Repairing the Designer has not been successful .

Name of the faulty application: AL_Designer.exe, version: 14.3.3.300, timestamp: 0x6655a889
Name of the faulty module: ntdll.dll, version: 10.0.17763.5933, timestamp: 0x28f68183
Exception code: 0xc0000374
Fehleroffset: 0x00000000000fb199
ID of the faulty process: 0x6ec
Start time of the faulty application: 0x01dae311d7c725ff
Path of the faulty application: D:\Program Files (x86)\SAP BusinessObjects\Data Services\bin\AL_Designer.exe
Path of the faulty module: C:\Windows\SYSTEM32\ntdll.dll
Berichtskennung: 692b0d8f-a8eb-4483-9d07-69d85ab2bc19
Full name of the faulty package:
Application ID that is relative to the faulty package:

Could the problem be related to an update of the Windows 2019 server, or was it just a matter of time before Designer crashed?
Before 17.07.2024, working and loading jobs from the central repository worked.
Does anyone know the problem and more importantly, does anyone have a solution to the problem?
Thank you very much for your help.
Best regards Andreas

entry.title: How to create delta logic for ckis table
Service Layer SQLQuery Proxy error
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I am trying to alter a SQLQuery as follows:

Patch Endpoint: https://<ip server>:50000/b1s/v1/SQLQueries('AquisitionCosts')

Body:

{
 "SqlCode": "AquisitionCosts",
 "SqlName": "AquisitionCosts",
 "SqlText": "select ItemCode, sum(APC) as APC from (select distinct ItemCode, TransType, APC from FIX1 where TransType in (110, 115, 120)) as v1 where ItemCode like '_________________' group by ItemCode"
}
 
The SQL is working fine but I do receive a proxy error howver:
<html>

<head>
    <title>502 Proxy Error</title>
</head>
<body>
    <h1>Proxy Error</h1>
    <p>The proxy server received an invalid
        response from an upstream server.<br />
The proxy server could not handle the request
    <p>Reason: <strong>Error reading from remote server</strong></p>
    </p>
</body>
</html>

entry.title: SAP Data Services 4.2 SP12 compatibility with Information Steward 4.2 SP14
entry.content:
Good Day!

We are trying to install SAP Information Steward in SAP Data Services (BODS) server. To install Information Steward we need to check the compatibility with SAP Data Services. Below is our SAP Data Services version:

How to read the version: 14.2.12.2309

  • 14.2 is SAP Data Services 4.2.
  • The second 12 means SP 12.
  • 2309 is the detailed patch number.

Could you please check and let us know if this version is compatible with Information Steward 4.2 SPS14 version

Thank you!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to load multiple files from network SFTP & archive the files by CIDS after sending to IBP.
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

In CI-DS my interface is very clear: File to IBP.

As per the requirement,  My interface has to read the data from the SFTP location( MFT as source) and have to archive the files after post-loading the data to IBP. But here the challenge facing as source is in network path and the DS agent/CIDs is in non-network location.

So if the interface made to read the multiple files through the CIDS with multiple data flows, but not able to perform the archiving by this approach.

Please help me on this issue.

Thanks,
Kalyan.

entry.title: Same LTMC Staging table throughout the SAP Environments
entry.content:
Hello,

Did anyone across a scenario where we have multiple SAP systems and we have to work with LTMC staging tables. The issue is the name of staging tables get changed in another sap system for same object.

Because of the different table name, we will be having difficulties manages the tables in BODS. Because if we want load data in another sap system, we will need to change the table. For example if we have 10 SAP systems then 10 different staging tables for the same object and we will have to manage those 10 tables each time we execute the BODS job.

Can anyone please explain if you have come across this scenario.

Thanks,

Imran
